testcase.name: test_swap_quote_native_to_custom
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration27_custom_tokens.py:247: in setup assert login_resp.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Troppe richieste. Riprova tra poco.","retry_after":39} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
